creator: goneri@lebouder.net
text:
Hi,

If I deploy an instance of OVH or Vexxhost clouds (OpenStack), I can get an DHCP lease but the IP is blocked. FreeBSD 13.0 was working fine in the same conditions.

"ifconfig vtnet0 -rxcsum" doesn't change anything.

If I switch to the e1000 driver, everything works as expected.
